title: The Straw Hats Answer Nami
description: On pages 17–19, the straw hats answer nami focuses on Nami, Arlong, Marine Captain Nezumi, Nojiko as nami’s stolen savings and Arlong’s betrayal push Cocoyashi Village into open rebellion, forcing her to ask Luffy for help.
scene: On pages 17–19, the straw hats answer nami focuses on Nami, Arlong, Marine Captain Nezumi, Nojiko as nami’s stolen savings and Arlong’s betrayal push Cocoyashi Village into open rebellion, forcing her to ask Luffy for help.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: We challenged them in order to make up for doubting sister Nami,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: But we lost just by a hair...!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: After hearing of Nami's true motives while in the forest, we realized we had made a terrible mistake.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: We don't have the right to face her again.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I'm sorry but we can't let you, who stand no chance of winning, through!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: We're waiting for a group of men that will und-oubtedly come here soon enough!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hey... you think those two ruffians just now,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Zoro's crew? Nah, couldn't be. They were way to weak for that.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: How do you like vogging with them? (Just don't feel too $1.2)

summary: This part turns Nami’s private suffering into an open crisis, ending with the emotional choice to rely on Luffy.
